overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The camera follows a blonde woman along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and eventually an NCPD police car that pulls over with officers exiting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: turns from street corner onto main sidewalk following the blonde woman

agents.ego_description: following a blonde woman in a black dress walking along the wet sidewalk under the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: blonde woman walking steadily ahead with hands in pockets
person with red umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: large concrete and metal elevated highway running parallel to the sidewalk
tall building facade with illuminated yellow geometric diamond patterns and pink neon accents
marked pedestrian crossing with traffic lights at the street corner
tall black traffic signal pole with multiple illuminated indicators

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy Night City street corner, transitioning onto a wide sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail structure. The camera follows a blonde woman past pedestrians carrying umbrellas, with a striking yellow geometric building facade illuminated on the right and wet pavement reflecting the neon city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated geometric wall

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace behind the blonde woman while navigating through oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: blonde woman continuing to walk ahead at consistent pace

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the lengthy sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the scene maintains a consistent cyberpunk atmosphere with the yellow geometric building facade now at mid-distance. Pedestrians with umbrellas regularly pass by in the opposite direction while futuristic vehicles drive on the wet street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: police traffic stop on futuristic city sidewalk

events.description: NCPD police car pulls over and stops on the left side of the sidewalk with flashing red and blue lights
police officers exit the vehicle and take positions on the sidewalk near the police car

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past the police stop without slowing down, moving between the officers and the building wall

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car with illuminated side panels pulling over and stopping on the sidewalk
police officer exiting the vehicle and standing guard on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic black and white police sedan with illuminated NCPD lettering and flashing emergency lights
massive vertical advertisement screen displaying a person's face in monochrome

segments.scene_description: An NCPD police car suddenly pulls over onto the sidewalk, its emergency lights flashing. Two officers exit and take positions as the camera continues walking past the scene. The yellow geometric building recedes into the distance while a large digital billboard dominates the right side of the frame, maintaining the rainy cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy, neon-lit sidewalk that transitions from a vibrant architectural corner to a tense police encounter. It begins at a street corner beneath an elevated monorail structure, following a blonde woman past pedestrians with umbrellas and a striking yellow geometric building facade. As the camera continues along the lengthy walkway, the yellow building recedes into the mid-distance while futuristic vehicles glide across the wet, reflective pavement to the left. The scene then shifts as an NCPD police car suddenly pulls over with flashing emergency lights, and two officers exit to take their positions. Finally, the camera moves past the officers toward a large digital billboard that dominates the right side of the frame under the persistent rain.
